[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10100000 2
1 01001101 4
2 00110110 4
3 11110101 6
4 10110011 5
5 01111000 4
6 00010111 4
7 01000110 3
